items.prompt: matches bounded quantities to the correct numerals and numerals to the correct quantities
items.expected_evidence: choose the numeral that names a shown quantity
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner completes the direct task accurately.

items.prompt: uses counting or subitizing evidence to justify numeral-choice decisions
items.expected_evidence: build or select a quantity that matches a shown numeral
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains the concept coherently.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to final_count_loss.
items.expected_evidence: reject mismatched numeral labels on bounded sets
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies the source of the error and states the correct reasoning.

items.prompt: succeeds across objects, pictures, cards, and simple story contexts
items.expected_evidence: move between spoken number, written numeral, and counted set coherently
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner succeeds in a less-familiar context.
